notableEvents.label: Riley Greene GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Riley Greene grounds into a double play, first baseman Josh Naylor to shortstop Colt Emerson to pitcher Bryce Miller. Kerry Carpenter out at 2nd. Riley Greene out at 1st.
